message:
feat: add release build scripts

Add build-release.sh for cross-compiling to darwin/linux on amd64/arm64,
and Makefile for common development tasks (build, test, release, clean).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+.PHONY: build test release clean
+
+build:
+	go build -o llm-proxy .
+
+test:
+	go test ./...
+
+release:
+	./scripts/build-release.sh $(VERSION)
+
+clean:
+	rm -rf llm-proxy dist/

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -e
+
+VERSION="${1:-dev}"
+OUTDIR="dist"
+
+mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"
+
+# Build for all targets
+for OS in darwin linux; do
+  for ARCH in amd64 arm64; do
+    echo "Building $OS/$ARCH..."
+    GOOS=$OS GOARCH=$ARCH go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o "$OUTDIR/llm-proxy-$OS-$ARCH" .
+  done
+done
+
+# Create tarballs for Homebrew
+cd "$OUTDIR"
+for f in llm-proxy-darwin-*; do
+  tar -czf "${f}.tar.gz" "$f"
+done
+
+echo "Build complete. Artifacts in $OUTDIR/"
